context.title: Project Overview
context.content: Enterprise-ready backend template. NestJS monolith + microservices. PostgreSQL/Prisma, Redis, JWT + OAuth2 auth, AES-256-GCM encryption. Skills in ./skills/

context.title: Architecture
context.content: main/ (monolith) with modules: auth, users, social-auth, cipher, websocket, cache, audit, grpc. Global guards: JwtAuthGuard + RolesGuard. Global ValidationPipe (whitelist, forbidNonWhitelisted). All DB via Prisma.

context.title: Security
context.content: Refresh tokens rotated (SHA-256 hash in refresh_tokens). Token theft detection revokes all sessions. User.isActive verified on every JWT request. Passwords bcrypt(10). Encryption with AES-256-GCM. @MaxLength(255) on all DTOs.
